answer:
DealCloud uses the OAuth2 Client Credentials flow for authentication [1]. To authenticate, send a POST request to the token endpoint with your client ID, secret, and requested scopes [1]. The server returns an access token valid for 900 seconds [1]. You must include this bearer token in the Authorization header of your subsequent API requests [1].

```
POST {baseUrl}/api/rest/v1/oauth/token
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

scope=data
&grant_type=client_credentials
&client_id={your_client_id}
&client_secret={your_client_secret}
```

Include the token in headers as `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}` [1].
